message:
🐛 Fix Kairos mission: remove fabricated CLI, update to v4.0.3 (#1825)

- Remove fabricated kairos-cli download (no such binary exists)
- Update from v3.3.3 to v4.0.3 (latest stable)
- Use correct Hadron image format for ISO download URLs
- Add interactive install via kairos-agent interactive-install
- Add automated install with cloud-config and AuroraBoot
- Add proper upgrade steps using kairos-agent upgrade
- Remove fake uninstall step for non-existent CLI
- All URLs verified against actual GitHub release assets
- All commands verified against official Kairos docs

Fixes feedback from kairos-io/kairos#4032

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,56 +12,60 @@
     "steps": [
       {
         "title": "Download Kairos ISO",
-        "description": "Download the Kairos ISO for your preferred base OS:\n```bash\n# Ubuntu-based\ncurl -Lo kairos.iso https://github.com/kairos-io/kairos/releases/download/v3.3.3/kairos-ubuntu-24.04-standard-amd64-generic-v3.3.3.iso\n\n# Or Alpine-based (smaller)\ncurl -Lo kairos.iso https://github.com/kairos-io/kairos/releases/download/v3.3.3/kairos-alpine-3.21-standard-amd64-generic-v3.3.3.iso\n```\nSee all flavors at https://github.com/kairos-io/kairos/releases"
+        "description": "Download the Kairos ISO for your target architecture. Kairos v4.0.3 uses the Hadron image format:\n```bash\n# Standard image with K3s v1.35.2 (recommended)\ncurl -Lo kairos.iso https://github.com/kairos-io/kairos/releases/download/v4.0.3/kairos-hadron-v0.0.4-standard-amd64-generic-v4.0.3-k3sv1.35.2+k3s1.iso\n```\nOther K3s versions are available. See all flavors at https://github.com/kairos-io/kairos/releases/tag/v4.0.3"
       },
       {
-        "title": "Boot and install",
-        "description": "Boot the ISO on your edge device (USB, PXE, or VM). The interactive installer will guide you through:\n- Network configuration\n- K3s/K8s installation\n- User setup\n\nOr use a cloud-config file for automated installation:\n```yaml\n#cloud-config\ninstall:\n  auto: true\n  device: /dev/sda\nk3s:\n  enabled: true\nusers:\n  - name: kairos\n    passwd: kairos\n```"
+        "title": "Boot and install interactively",
+        "description": "Boot the ISO on your edge device (USB, PXE, or VM). From the GRUB menu, select `kairos (interactive install)` to launch the guided installer.\n\nAlternatively, from the LiveCD terminal run:\n```bash\nkairos-agent interactive-install\n```\n\nThe installer walks you through network, user, and K3s configuration. The resulting config is saved to `/oem/90_custom.yaml`."
       },
       {
-        "title": "Verify the Kubernetes cluster",
-        "description": "After installation, SSH into the node:\n```bash\nssh kairos@<node-ip>\nsudo k3s kubectl get nodes\nsudo k3s kubectl get pods -A\n```"
+        "title": "Automated install (optional)",
+        "description": "For zero-touch provisioning, create a `cloud-config.yaml`:\n```yaml\n#cloud-config\ninstall:\n  device: \"/dev/sda\"\n  reboot: true\n  auto: true\nusers:\n  - name: kairos\n    passwd: kairos\n```\n\nSupply it via one of these methods:\n- **ISO datasource**: package it as a cidata ISO attached at boot\n- **URL**: add `config_url=https://example.com/cloud-config.yaml` to boot parameters\n- **Embedded**: remaster the ISO with AuroraBoot:\n```bash\ndocker run -v $PWD/cloud-config.yaml:/cloud-config.yaml \\\n  -v $PWD/build:/tmp/auroraboot \\\n  -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock \\\n  --rm -ti quay.io/kairos/auroraboot \\\n  --set container_image=oci:$IMAGE \\\n  --cloud-config /cloud-config.yaml \\\n  --set \"state_dir=/tmp/auroraboot\"\n```"
       },
       {
-        "title": "Install the Kairos CLI (optional)",
-        "description": "The Kairos CLI helps manage nodes:\n```bash\ncurl -Lo kairos-cli https://github.com/kairos-io/kairos/releases/download/v3.3.3/kairos-cli-linux-amd64\nchmod +x kairos-cli\nsudo mv kairos-cli /usr/local/bin/kairos\nkairos version\n```"
+        "title": "Verify the Kubernetes cluster",
+        "description": "After installation and reboot, SSH into the node and verify K3s is running:\n```bash\nssh kairos@<node-ip>\nsudo k3s kubectl get nodes\nsudo k3s kubectl get pods -A\n```\nAll system pods should be in `Running` state."
       }
     ],
     "resolution": {
-      "summary": "Kairos is installed as an immutable Linux OS with Kubernetes (K3s) for edge computing with atomic upgrades.",
+      "summary": "Kairos is installed as an immutable Linux OS with K3s for edge computing. Nodes are managed via cloud-config and upgraded atomically via OCI container images with A/B rollback support.",
       "codeSnippets": [
         "sudo k3s kubectl get nodes",
-        "sudo kairos upgrade --image quay.io/kairos/ubuntu:v3.3.3"
+        "sudo kairos-agent upgrade --source oci:quay.io/kairos/hadron:v0.0.4-standard-amd64-generic-v4.0.3-k3sv1.35.2-k3s1"
       ]
     },
     "uninstall": [
       {
         "title": "Reinstall the OS",
-        "description": "Kairos is an immutable OS \u2014 to remove it, reinstall a different OS on the device."
-      },
-      {
-        "title": "Remove Kairos CLI",
-        "description": "```bash\nsudo rm /usr/local/bin/kairos\n```"
+        "description": "Kairos is an immutable OS — to remove it, reinstall a different OS on the device."
       }
     ],
     "upgrade": [
       {
-        "title": "Upgrade via container image",
-        "description": "Kairos upgrades atomically via OCI images:\n```bash\nsudo kairos upgrade --image quay.io/kairos/ubuntu:v3.3.3\n```\nThe system will reboot into the new version with A/B rollback support."
+        "title": "List available versions",
+        "description": "```bash\nsudo kairos-agent upgrade list-releases\n```\nUse `--registry` to specify a custom registry (defaults to quay.io/kairos)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade the active system",
+        "description": "Upgrade atomically via OCI image:\n```bash\nsudo kairos-agent upgrade --source oci:quay.io/kairos/hadron:v0.0.4-standard-amd64-generic-v4.0.3-k3sv1.35.2-k3s1\n```\nTest the new system before upgrading recovery."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade the recovery system",
+        "description": "Only after confirming the active system works:\n```bash\nsudo kairos-agent upgrade --recovery --source oci:quay.io/kairos/hadron:v0.0.4-standard-amd64-generic-v4.0.3-k3sv1.35.2-k3s1\n```"
       }
     ],
     "troubleshooting": [
       {
         "title": "Node fails to boot after install",
-        "description": "Check the install logs in `/var/log/kairos/` and ensure the target disk is correct."
+        "description": "Check the install logs in `/var/log/kairos/` and ensure the target disk device path is correct in cloud-config."
       },
       {
         "title": "K3s not starting",
         "description": "Check the K3s service:\n```bash\nsudo systemctl status k3s\nsudo journalctl -u k3s\n```"
       },
       {
         "title": "P2P mesh not forming",
-        "description": "Kairos P2P mesh requires UDP port 51820 (WireGuard) to be open between nodes."
+        "description": "Kairos P2P mesh requires UDP port 51820 (WireGuard) to be open between nodes. Verify with:\n```bash\nsudo ss -ulnp | grep 51820\n```"
       }
     ]
   },
